message:
test(conformance): add BITFIELD OVERFLOW WRAP and GETEX/GETDEL test cases

- Add OVERFLOW WRAP tests for unsigned and signed integers in core_bitmap.json
  to cover the recent sign-extension fix for BITFIELD WRAP mode
- Add GETEX and GETDEL conformance tests to core_strings.json to ensure these
  Redis 6.2+ commands are properly validated

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1007,6 +1007,138 @@
         "value": "ERR Invalid OVERFLOW type (should be one of WRAP, SAT, FAIL)"
       }
     },
+    {
+      "name": "bitfield_overflow_wrap_u8_setup",
+      "now_ms": 741,
+      "argv": [
+        "BITFIELD",
+        "bf_wrap_u8",
+        "SET",
+        "u8",
+        "0",
+        "250"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          {
+            "kind": "integer",
+            "value": 0
+          }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "bitfield_overflow_wrap_u8_incrby",
+      "now_ms": 742,
+      "argv": [
+        "BITFIELD",
+        "bf_wrap_u8",
+        "OVERFLOW",
+        "WRAP",
+        "INCRBY",
+        "u8",
+        "0",
+        "10"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          {
+            "kind": "integer",
+            "value": 4
+          }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "bitfield_overflow_wrap_i8_setup",
+      "now_ms": 743,
+      "argv": [
+        "BITFIELD",
+        "bf_wrap_i8",
+        "SET",
+        "i8",
+        "0",
+        "100"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          {
+            "kind": "integer",
+            "value": 0
+          }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "bitfield_overflow_wrap_i8_positive_to_negative",
+      "now_ms": 744,
+      "argv": [
+        "BITFIELD",
+        "bf_wrap_i8",
+        "OVERFLOW",
+        "WRAP",
+        "INCRBY",
+        "i8",
+        "0",
+        "50"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          {
+            "kind": "integer",
+            "value": -106
+          }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "bitfield_overflow_wrap_i8_negative_setup",
+      "now_ms": 745,
+      "argv": [
+        "BITFIELD",
+        "bf_wrap_i8_neg",
+        "SET",
+        "i8",
+        "0",
+        "-100"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          {
+            "kind": "integer",
+            "value": 0
+          }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "bitfield_overflow_wrap_i8_negative_to_positive",
+      "now_ms": 746,
+      "argv": [
+        "BITFIELD",
+        "bf_wrap_i8_neg",
+        "OVERFLOW",
+        "WRAP",
+        "INCRBY",
+        "i8",
+        "0",
+        "-50"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          {
+            "kind": "integer",
+            "value": 106
+          }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
     {
       "name": "bitfield_i16_signed",
       "now_ms": 750,
